HEARING SET FOR JAN-24-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL AWARD COSTS OF THIS PROCEEDING IN THE AMOUNT OF $776.69, PER MEMORANDUM OF COSTS, AND ATTORNEYS FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $975.00. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF WESTERN STATES DRYWALL/LATHING INDUSTRY LABOR-MANGEMENT COOPERATION COMMITTEE INC ON BEHALF OF  THE CARPENTERS FUNDS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT J.M.L. INC., A CALIFORNIA COPORATION $306,733.89 PRINCIPAL, $975.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $776.69 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $308,485.58, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (NO SASE; COPIES IN 301 OUTBOX)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will award costs of this proceeding in the amount of $776.69, per Memorandum of Costs, and attorneys fees in the amount of $975.00. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
